company_name: Holly Days Nursery, Garden Center, & Landscaping
tagline: Your Award-Winning Family-Owned Nursery, Garden Center, and Landscaping Experts Since 1994

hero.headline:
Your Landscape Dream, Rooted in
30 Years of Care
hero.subheadline: Your yard deserves more than guesswork. Holly Days brings certified horticulturists, award-winning designers, and 32 years of family passion to every project — from a single shrub to a complete outdoor transformation.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Outdoor Space<br class="hidden md:block"> Could Ever Need
services.subtitle: From design to installation to year-round care, Holly Days is your single source for nursery stock, landscaping, hardscaping, ponds, and bulk materials across the Philadelphia region.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Accredited designers create custom plans that suit your property and budget — from plantings and garden beds to complete outdoor transformations that turn heads.

cards.title: Hardscape Design & Construction
cards.description: Patios, walkways, retaining walls, pergolas, outdoor kitchens, and fire pits built by ICPI Certified technicians using premium flagstone, Belgium stone, and natural materials.

cards.title: Nursery & Garden Center
cards.description: Browse our seven-acre garden center featuring the largest selection of perennials, trees, shrubs, and annuals in the region — plus garden decor and expert advice.

cards.title: Pond & Aquatics
cards.description: Complete pond design, installation, and maintenance with the largest fully stocked aquatics department in the area. Our pond experts are always on call for your questions.

cards.title: Bulk Materials & Delivery
cards.description: Premium grade mulch, topsoil, natural stone, flagstone, and patio stone available for pickup or delivery. Get exactly what you need, when you need it.

cards.title: Landscape Maintenance
cards.description: Tree pruning, sod installation, seasonal plantings, and ongoing property care that keeps your outdoor spaces looking their absolute best year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. Our accredited designers will visit your home, listen to your goals, and provide an honest, no-pressure quote tailored to your budget.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our certified horticulturists and ICPI technicians bring your plan to life — selecting the perfect plants, materials, and features from our own seven-acre nursery and growing fields.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Oasis
steps.description: Relax in a landscape built to thrive for years. We stand behind every project with ongoing maintenance options and a satisfaction guarantee that means we are not done until you love it.

about.label: Why Homeowners Trust Holly Days
about.headline: Not Just a Nursery — Your Complete Outdoor Partner
about.description: Family-owned since 1994, Holly Days started as a small roadside nursery in Ambler and grew into a seven-acre destination with six additional acres of growing fields. Our team includes PLNA Certified Horticulturists, accredited landscape designers, and ICPI Certified technicians — all dedicated to making your property extraordinary. Voted Top 5 Landscapers in Philadelphia by CBS Philly and Best in Montgomery County.

features.title: Certified & Award-Winning Team
features.description: Every project is guided by PLNA Certified Horticulturists, accredited designers, and ICPI hardscape technicians with degrees from top programs.

features.title: Largest Selection in the Region
features.description: Seven acres of retail nursery plus six acres of growing fields means you get the widest variety of plants, trees, and materials — all grown and selected by experts.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: With an A+ BBB rating maintained since 2005 and Best of Houzz awards year after year, we earn your trust on every single project.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest pricing from a family business that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Rooted in Quality" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any project, product, or service visit, we will come back and make it right at no additional cost. With 32 years and an A+ BBB rating on the line, we do not cut corners — we plant roots. Your landscape will thrive, or we will work until it does.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my landscaping project?
faqs.answer: Most design consultations are scheduled within one week. Depending on project scope and season, installations typically begin within 2-4 weeks of finalizing your plan. Call us and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to visit the nursery before starting a project?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Our designers can come to you for a free on-site consultation. That said, many clients love visiting our seven-acre garden center to see plants, stone, and materials in person before making final selections.

faqs.question: Are your landscapers certified and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team includes PLNA Certified Horticulturists, accredited landscape designers, and ICPI Certified hardscape technicians. We carry full liability insurance and have maintained an A+ BBB rating since 2005.

faqs.question: Do you deliver bulk materials?
faqs.answer: Yes! We deliver premium mulch, topsoil, natural stone, flagstone, and patio materials across the greater Philadelphia region. You can also pick up directly from our Ambler location on Horsham Road.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Ambler, Horsham, Lansdale, Blue Bell, Warminster, Philadelphia, all of Montgomery County, and 40+ municipalities across the greater Philadelphia region. Call us to confirm service in your area.

testimonials.name: Bradley F.
testimonials.text: Dealing with Mary, Jim, his assistant, and the whole team at Holly Days has been a pleasure! I feel our landscape took the giant leap yesterday from 'meh' to 'amazing!'

testimonials.name: Aaron F.
testimonials.text: I was shown the whole nursery on all things that could work and what wouldn't. It was truly one of the best customer service experiences I've ever had in any industry.

testimonials.name: Ash C.
testimonials.text: My family has been using Holly Days for years and has always gotten great products and professional attitudes! One of their employees, Matt, helped me with an issue saving us a lot of time!

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation from our award-winning design team. We will visit your property, listen to your vision, and provide an honest estimate — no obligations.
